## 📚 OpenAlex

*本表数据来自 OpenAlex 检索，关键词组为 (uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)，时间窗口 2026-01-22 ~ 2026-01-28。*

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 9 | Enhancing aviation safety with artificial intelligence: A systematic literature review on recent advances, challenges and future perspectives | 系统综述175篇AI与LLM在航空安全领域的研究，聚焦人为因素、事故分析与运营优化 | https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aei.2026.104378 | 航空安全,人工智能,系统综述,LLM | 2026-01-27 | Advanced Engineering Informatics | 2 |
| 9 | AI-driven Intrusion Detection for UAV in Smart Urban Ecosystems: A Comprehensive Survey | 全面调研AI驱动UAV在城市生态系统中的入侵检测技术 | https://openalex.org/W7126001135 | UAV,入侵检测,智慧城市,AI安全 | 2026-01-27 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | AION: Aerial Indoor Object-Goal Navigation Using Dual-Policy Reinforcement Learning | 提出AION系统：基于双策略强化学习的空中室内目标导航 | https://openalex.org/W7125567175 | 强化学习,无人机,目标导航,室内导航 | 2026-01-22 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 8 | iDesignGPT enhances conceptual design via large language model agentic workflows | iDesignGPT利用LLM智能体工作流提升概念设计效率 | https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-026-68672-1 | LLM,概念设计,智能体,工作流 | 2026-01-24 | Nature Communications | 1 |
| 7 | MeCo: Enhancing LLM-Empowered Multi-Robot Collaboration via Similar Task Memoization | 提出MeCo框架：通过相似任务记忆化增强LLM赋能的多机器人协作 | https://openalex.org/W7126123338 | 多机器人,LLM,协作,任务记忆 | 2026-01-28 | arXiv (Cornell University) | 0 |
| 7 | ComAgent: Multi-LLM based Agentic AI Empowered Intelligent Wireless Networks | 提出ComAgent：基于多LLM的智能体AI赋能6G无线网络优化 | https://openalex.org/W7126001030 | 多LLM,智能体,无线网络,6G | 2026-01-27 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 7 | An LLM-Agent-Based Framework for Age of Information Optimization in Heterogeneous Random Access Networks | 基于LLM智能体的异构随机接入网络信息年龄优化框架 | https://openalex.org/W7125877521 | LLM,信息年龄,无线网络,优化 | 2026-01-26 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 6 | AI Flow: perspectives, scenarios, and approaches | 探讨AI Flow的视角、场景与方法论 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s44336-025-00031-y | AI Flow,信息论,机器智能 | 2026-01-26 | Vicinagearth. | 11 |
| 6 | A Review of AI-Driven Engineering Modelling and Optimization | AI驱动工程建模与优化的方法论与应用综述 | https://doi.org/10.3390/a19020093 | AI,工程优化,建模,综述 | 2026-01-23 | Algorithms | 1 |
| 6 | Advanced Fault Detection and Diagnosis Exploiting Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence | 面向工程应用的ML与AI驱动故障检测与诊断 | https://doi.org/10.3390/electronics15020476 | 故障检测,机器学习,工程系统 | 2026-01-22 | Electronics | 1 |
| 5 | m2sv: A Scalable Benchmark for Map-to-Street-View Spatial Reasoning | 提出m2sv基准：地图到街景空间推理的可扩展基准 | https://openalex.org/W7126001143 | 视觉语言模型,空间推理,基准 | 2026-01-27 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | LLMs and IoT: A Comprehensive Survey on Large Language Models and the Internet of Things | LLMs与IoT综合调研 | https://doi.org/10.36227/techrxiv.174063060.01215875/v4 | LLM,IoT,综合调研 | 2026-01-27 | - | 0 |
| 5 | Enhancing Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning via Knowledge-Embedded Modular Framework for Online Basketball Games | 知识嵌入模块化框架提升在线篮球游戏MARL性能 | https://doi.org/10.3390/math14030419 | 多智能体强化学习,篮球,知识嵌入 | 2026-01-25 | Mathematics | 0 |
| 4 | Cybersecurity in Radio Frequency Technologies: A Scientometric and Systematic Review | 射频技术网络安全的科学计量与系统综述 | https://doi.org/10.3390/s26020747 | 网络安全,射频,IoT | 2026-01-22 | Sensors | 0 |
| 4 | AUTOMATING THE COLLECTION OF SAXAUL SEEDS USING ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE | AI自动化采集沙拐种子用于荒漠化治理 | https://doi.org/10.53360/2788-7995-2025-4(20)-18 | AI,自动化,农业,荒漠化 | 2026-01-25 | Bulletin of Shakarim University Technical Sciences | 0 |

sections.heading: 🔎 GitHub 指定日期检索
